chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 293 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1464/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.1325/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Malano, Advocates for the Petitioner. >>>>>..<<<<< Through instant Constitutional Petition, the petitioner has prayed for issuing directions against the respondents for deciding his application in response to such application several letters have been issued by the Department which are (available at pages 17 to 22). Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh present in Court in some other matters waives the notice and submits that the respondents will decide the application of the petitioner in accordance with the law. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of with direction to the respondents to decide the application of the petitioner (if pending) within 60 days hereof in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
